concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文详细列出了15条模型假设，包括成本常数、水力学简化、区域几何抽象、需求增长模式等，并逐一给出合理性论证。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Necessary Assumptions for the Model ... it was assumed that the cost of desalinating conventional seawater is a constant $3.79 per 1000 gallons ...

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 利用Hazen-Williams方程推导水运输成本与距离成正比，通过线性回归从案例数据中提取单位运输成本常数0.00344美元/千加仑/英里。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: the Hazen-Williams Equation ... states that the head loss hl inherent in the movement of a given quantity of water satisfies hl = 4.73LQ4.73/ (C1.852D4.87)

concepts_used.title: 线性规划建模
concepts_used.how_used: 构建线性规划模型，以最小化总成本为目标，决策变量包括各区域水源选择、运输量、管道建设等，约束条件包括供需平衡、资源上限、成本限制等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We seek to design a computerized model which would represent the cost of transporting fresh water ... and the cost of transporting this processed fresh water ...

concepts_used.title: 最短路径算法（Dijkstra、Floyd）
concepts_used.how_used: 在区域间水运输中，假设缺水区域从最近的盈余区域调水，隐含使用最短路径（距离）原则确定调水路线。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: any region which has a shortage of water ... will draw water from the nearest region which has a surplus of water

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文对关键参数（如运输成本常数、海水淡化成本）进行灵敏度分析，考察其对总成本和政策建议的影响。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To quantify the effects of our plan, we seek to design a computerized model ...

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用地理信息可视化展示美国各区域的水资源供需分布、调水路线及成本分区图。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We seek to develop a comprehensive policy plan ... to manage the growth of water supply and demand over the period until 2025

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分清晰陈述问题背景、研究目标、五项具体准则，并概述建模思路，符合IMRaD结构。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Introduction and Problem Statement ... We seek to develop a comprehensive policy plan to present to the United States Congress ...

concepts_used.title: 参考文献格式（GB/T 7714）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文引用Yuhas and Daniels (2006)、Lansey、Kally (1993)、EPA (2000)、Pittman (2009)等文献，格式规范。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: According to Yuhas and Daniels (2006) ... (Yuhas and Daniels, 2006, p. 577) ... (Lansey, p. 1) ... (Kally, 1993) ... (EPA, 2000) ... (Pittman, 2009)
